name: Codex Work Badge - local Mac app build gate
description: Local-only gate for the Codex Work Badge Mac app: aggregate parser, public badge privacy, deterministic square export, QA artifacts, and Tauri DMG path.

operatorBrief.context: New project local Mac app for generating social-ready Codex work badges from private local aggregates.
operatorBrief.problem: The app handles sensitive Codex logs and must not leak prompts, responses, paths, client names, secrets, or account data into public badge exports.
operatorBrief.recommendation: Run the local badge doctor, tests, visual QA, browser QA, user-story audit, build and DMG script before any ready claim. Keep Apple Developer ID signing/notarization separate.
operatorBrief.nextAsk: Use the generated local DMG for install testing; do not add hosted sharing, telemetry, signing or notarization without a separate approval gate.

autonomy.description: May run local read-only parsers, tests, doctors, visual artifact QA and local build scripts. Stops before hosted sharing, telemetry, Apple credentials, signing/notarization, deploy, publish, Shopify or global Codex mutation.
approvalRequiredFor: Apple Developer ID signing or notarization
hosted sharing, public profile, leaderboard or social API posting
global Codex config, hooks, automations, skills or agent changes
Shopify, Paperclip, credential, deploy, publish, payment, customer or order action

runtimeSources: Selected local Codex root rollout JSONL files

forbiddenWithoutSameTurnApproval: network upload, telemetry, crash reporting or analytics
hosted badge gallery, social API posting, public profile, leaderboard or QR tracking
read arbitrary home directory, browser profile, Keychain, SSH, .env or Paperclip secret folders
Shopify CLI, Shopify Admin API, theme push, theme publish or store mutation
deploy, publish, send, payment, customer, order or credential mutation
Apple Developer ID signing or notarization

expectedEvidence: privacy doctor exits 0 and reports no forbidden public data, no network APIs and no browser persistence
unit tests cover rollout counting, sqlite fixture loading, out-of-scope rollout blocking, public manifest safety and ledger redaction
visual QA produces exact 1080x1080 and 4096x4096 PNGs plus summary JSON
browser QA proves root edit, scan, custom QR URL, Save success, Copy success, blocked fallbacks and no overflow
user story audit updates docs/qa/codex-work-badge-user-stories.csv and reports pass/fix/block status for every feature
codex-badge build exits 0 and produces the Vite dist
DMG packaging is only claimed after Rust/Cargo preflight and Tauri build succeed

rollback: Remove apps/codex-work-badge, codex-badge scripts and this loop contract. Delete artifacts/codex-work-badge if generated.
stopCondition: Stop on privacy leak, out-of-root read, network/telemetry evidence, failed PNG dimensions, failed Rust/Tauri/DMG preflight, or any request to publish/share/deploy without same-turn approval.
